# As a full-service bank with over 190 years of experience, Scotiabank is your gateway to global market connectivity and industry expertise

We offer clients a range of financial services including lending, transaction services, investment banking advice, and access to capital markets.

Operating in the U.S. since 1885, our dedicated leadership team is committed to strengthening our presence in the U.S. market and driving growth across North America.

[Our LeadershipLeadership at Scotiabank GBM](https://www.gbm.scotiabank.com/en/about-overview/our-leadership.html)

![video thumbnail](https://play.vidyard.com/gafJRCtfRjnmxsdrRugBMK.jpg)

[![decorative](https://www.gbm.scotiabank.com/content/dam/scotiabank/gbm/home/SF-GettyImages-1207860891-GoldenGate.jpg)\\
\\
Watch video \\
\\
Seamlessly connecting North America](https://www.gbm.scotiabank.com/en.html#!)

##### Video Transcript

As the only bank with scale across Canada, United States and Mexico, we have the expertise and solutions to ensure your business operates seamlessly across borders. ​

​Because your success is our success. ​

​That’s what true partnership is—where shared commitment fuels profitable and sustainable growth. ​

​Commitment no matter the market condition.​

​Because we believe your business should expect nothing less. ​

​You’re all in. We’re all in with you.

Source for Top 10 Foreign Banking Organization in the U.S.: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (U.S.). - Structure and Share Data for U.S. Banking Offices of Foreign Entities - March 2025.

Scotiabank is a marketing name for the global corporate and investment banking and capital markets businesses of The Bank of Nova Scotia and certain of its affiliates in the countries where they operate, including Scotia Capital Inc. Scotia Capital Inc. is the Canadian legal entity within Scotiabank’s Global Banking & Markets division that provides securities services, regulated by the [Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization (CIRO)](https://www.ciro.ca/ "CIRO website") and is a member of the [Canadian Investor Protection Fund.](https://www.cipf.ca/) Visit our [legal page](https://www.gbm.scotiabank.com/en/legal.html) for more information.

[![](https://www.gbm.scotiabank.com/content/dam/itrade/images/CIRO-OCRI-Logo.svg)](https://www.ciro.ca/)
